spec_match.rationale: The live preview now applies native alpha(from var(--gradient-base) / N%) when supported and uses rgba() only as an explicit fallback.

interactive.rationale: Good interactive controls for stops, base color, and stop count, updating the preview live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The blurb and generated CSS now focus on the CSS Color 5 alpha() function.

edge_cases.rationale: The page uses CSS.supports() for the real alpha() grammar and exposes a clean fallback state for unsupported browsers.

references.rationale: The parent index.html cites the ChromeStatus link, though it is missing from this concept page's see also section.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to the design system layout and styles.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh direct browser recheck loaded the route, exercised every detected control, and found no runtime, action, naming, or navigation failure.

summary: Ignores stale detached range events after stop-count controls rebuild, avoiding null-label exceptions. Fresh targeted validation passed.
